R

reachableBox - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Container listing the LAN addresses the server is reachable at.
reachableTitle - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Caption above the reachable-at list.
readerThread - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
The background reader thread.
readInt(String, int) - Static method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Reads an integer key from DotEnv, falling back to def when the key is absent, blank, or not a valid integer.
readLoop() - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Reader-thread loop: reads inbound objects until shutdown/disconnect, routing ServerResponses to their pending future and ServerEvents to the EventBus.
recipientUserId - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Recipient staff user's id, or null when addressed to a visitor.
recipientVisitorId - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Recipient visitor's national id, or null when addressed to a staff user.
RED - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Error red (failed log lines).
refreshBtn - Variable in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Manually reloads the pending queue.
refreshBtn - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Manually refreshes the occupancy header.
refreshBtn - Variable in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Manually reloads the notifications.
refreshBtn - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Manually reloads the waiting list.
refreshOccupancy() - Method in class client.view.GateController
Fetches live occupancy for the employee's park and repaints the header.
refreshVisitorAlert() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Recomputes the visitor attention line from the pending/waiting/unread counts.
register(Navigator.Screen) - Method in class client.app.Navigator
Registers a screen so it can later be navigated to by its id.
register(ClientSession, SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Records that session wants events for key, both in the shared registry bucket and on the session itself (so disconnect cleanup can find every key the session held).
register(SchedulerJob) - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Registers a job under its SchedulerJob.name().
REGISTER_GUIDE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Register a visitor as a group guide (service rep only).
REGISTER_SUBSCRIBER - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Register a visitor as a subscriber (service rep only).
registerBtn - Variable in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Submits the guide registration.
registerBtn - Variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Submits the subscriber registration.
registerGuide(long, int) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Registers a visitor as a group guide by inserting the guide row with today's approval date and the service rep who registered them.
registerGuide(long, String, String, String) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Registers a visitor as a group guide (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role and stamps the guide row with the logged-in rep's id).
registerSubscriber(long, int) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Promotes a visitor to a subscriber: marks visitor.is_subscriber TRUE and inserts the subscriber row with today's join date.
registerSubscriber(long, String, String, String, int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Registers a subscriber (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role).
REJECT_PARAM_CHANGE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Reject a pending parameter-change request (dept.
REJECTED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ChangeStatus
Rejected by a department manager; the park was left unchanged.
rejectParamChange(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Rejects a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); the park is left unchanged.
releasePriorSessionLock(ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.AuthController
Releases the single-login lock this connection currently holds, if any, and clears its logged-in state — called at the start of a new login so a quick-login that switches actors on the same socket (e.g.
reload() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Reloads the current visitor's list (no-op if nothing is loaded).
REMINDER_LEAD_HOURS - Static variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Hours before a visit that the confirmation reminder fires.
ReminderJob - Class in server.scheduler
Sends confirmation reminders for upcoming PENDING reservations.
ReminderJob(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.ReminderJob
Creates the job with a sink for its one-line run summaries.
remoteAddressString() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Returns string form of the peer's socket address (or "(unknown)" if the address is no longer available) for use in log lines.
removeEntry(int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Removes a queue entry — when its visitor accepts the grab, leaves the list, or lets an offer expire.
removeSubscriber(SubscriptionKey, Consumer<ServerEvent>) - Method in class client.net.EventBus
Removes cb from the subscriber list for key.
render(CancellationsReportDTO) - Method in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Paints the per-day chart and the range-summary line from the server's report.
render(VisitsReportDTO, String) - Method in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Paints the chart and summary tiles from the server's report.
renderDeptManager() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Renders the department-manager dashboard: a pending-approvals card.
renderParkEmployee() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Renders the park-employee dashboard: a live occupancy card for their park.
renderParkManager() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Renders the park-manager dashboard: their park's configured capacity card.
renderServiceRep() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Renders the service-rep dashboard: registration quick links, no metric card.
renderVisitor() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Renders the visitor dashboard: next-visit and active-reservations cards.
REPORT_CANCELLATIONS - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Run the Cancellations report (dept.
REPORT_VISITS_BY_TYPE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Run the Visits-by-Type report (dept.
ReportController - Class in server.control
Owns the reporting domain: the Visits-by-Type and Cancellations reports the department manager runs across the region.
ReportController() - Constructor for class server.control.ReportController
Creates the report controller.
reportDao - Variable in class server.control.ReportController
Report data access (visits-by-type, cancellations).
ReportDAO - Class in server.dao
Read-only data access object backing the department manager's reports.
ReportDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.ReportDAO
Creates the report DAO.
reportRequest(RequestType, String, String, Integer) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Shared builder for the two report requests.
REQUEST_PARAM_CHANGE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Submit a park-parameter change request (park manager only).
REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS - Static variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
How long ClientConnection.sendRequest(ClientRequest) waits for a reply, in seconds.
requestedBy - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Identifier of the park manager who requested the change (user.id).
requesterName - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Full name of the requesting park manager, joined in from user for display.
requestParamChange(ParamField, int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Submits a park-parameter change request (PARK_MANAGER only).
RequestRouter - Class in server.net
Central request dispatcher.
RequestRouter() - Constructor for class server.net.RequestRouter
Builds the dispatch map by registering every domain controller and fanning out the RequestTypes each one declares it handles.
requestsBox - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Container for the session-local "submitted this session" rows.
requestsEmpty - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Whether the session-local "submitted" list still shows its empty-state row.
RequestType - Enum Class in common.dto
Defines all request types that can be sent between client and server.
RequestType() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.RequestType
 
reservation - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
The reservation as persisted after the edit (carries the new price).
ReservationController - Class in server.control
Owns the reservation & waiting-list domain (create/get/update/cancel/list, confirm, join/leave waitlist, accept grab).
ReservationController() - Constructor for class server.control.ReservationController
Creates the reservation controller.
ReservationCreateController - Class in client.view
Booking form for a new park reservation (INDIVIDUAL / FAMILY / GROUP visits).

Creates the reservation-create controller.
ReservationCreateController.ParkOption - Record Class in client.view
Park dropdown entry: carries the id but renders the name.
reservationDao - Variable in class server.control.ParkController
Read-only collaborator for RequestType.CHECK_AVAILABILITY.
reservationDao - Variable in class server.control.VisitController
Reservation data access (resolve a booking at the gate).
reservationDao - Variable in class server.scheduler.NoShowJob
Stateless DAO collaborator, shared across runs.
reservationDao - Variable in class server.scheduler.ReminderJob
Stateless DAO collaborator, shared across runs.
ReservationDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the reservation table.
ReservationDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Creates the reservation DAO.
ReservationDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a single park reservation.
ReservationDTO(int, int, long, String, String, int, VisitType, ReservationStatus, boolean, Long, int, boolean, Integer, String) - Constructor for class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Creates a fully populated reservation.
reservationId - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Identifier of the backing reservation, or null for a casual walk-in.
reservationId - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Identifier of the WAITING reservation this entry queues.
ReservationListController - Class in client.view
"My Reservations" screen: look up a visitor's reservations by id and manage them.

Creates the reservation-list controller.
ReservationListController.EditFlow - Class in client.view
The on-screen reschedule wizard for a single reservation.
reservations - Variable in class server.scheduler.ConfirmTimeoutJob
Stateless controller collaborator (holds only DAOs); a fresh instance is fine.
reservations - Variable in class server.scheduler.WaitlistGrabExpiryJob
Stateless controller collaborator (holds only DAOs); a fresh instance is fine.
reservationsFrom(ServerResponse) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Extracts the reservation list from a LIST_RESERVATIONS response.
ReservationStatus - Enum Class in common.dto
Lifecycle state of a ReservationDTO.
ReservationStatus() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
 
ReservationUpdateResultDTO - Class in common.dto
Result of a successful RequestType.UPDATE_RESERVATION: the freshly persisted ReservationDTO bundled with the price before and after the edit, so the client can settle the difference.
ReservationUpdateResultDTO(ReservationDTO, int, int) - Constructor for class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Creates an update result.
resolveEntry(ClientRequest) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Resolves the waiting-list entry a request targets.
resolveInitialPassword() - Static method in class server.db.DBConnection
Resolves the initial password from DB_PASSWORD (env then system property), defaulting to empty.
resource(String) - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Resolves a required classpath resource.
response - Variable in class client.service.NetworkService.ProbeResult
The PING response (or a synthetic error response on failure).
resubscribe(List<ReservationDTO>) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Points this screen's realtime subscriptions at exactly the reservation ids currently displayed.
resubscribe(List<WaitlistEntryDTO>) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Points this screen's per-reservation subscriptions at exactly the WAITING reservation ids on screen, dropping the previous set first (also sends the matching UNSUBSCRIBE).
result - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
The server's update result, filled on Confirm to drive the Settlement step.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Result/toast label for action feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Result/toast label for validation and errors.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Result/toast label for registration feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Result/toast label for action feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Result/toast label for submit feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Result/toast label for booking feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Toast/status label for load and action feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Result/toast label for registration feedback.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Result/toast label for validation and errors.
resultLabel - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Result/toast label for action feedback.
reviewBody() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Returns the step-2 body: an old → new comparison of the edited fields.
reviewRow(GridPane, int, String, String, String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Adds one "key: old → new" row to the review grid.
role - Variable in class common.dto.UserDTO
Staff role governing the user's permissions.
Role - Enum Class in common.dto
Staff role of a user row.
Role() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.Role
 
roleLbl - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Pretty-printed role of the logged-in actor.
router - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
Shared request dispatcher, one instance across all client threads.
rows - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
One row per active day, oldest first (quiet days omitted).
rows - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
One row per visitor category (always both "INDIVIDUALS" and "GROUPS").
runAcceptLoop() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
Accept loop: binds the socket and spawns a handler thread per client.
runAllNow() - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Triggers an off-cycle run of every registered job.
running - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
Whether the accept loop is running.
runNow(String) - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Triggers one off-cycle run of the named job, off the caller's thread (so an FX button handler does not block).
runOnce() - Method in interface server.scheduler.SchedulerJob
Convenience for the normal, non-forced sweep — equivalent to runOnce(false).
runOnce(boolean) - Method in class server.scheduler.ConfirmTimeoutJob
 
runOnce(boolean) - Method in class server.scheduler.NoShowJob
 
runOnce(boolean) - Method in class server.scheduler.ReminderJob
 
runOnce(boolean) - Method in interface server.scheduler.SchedulerJob
Performs one sweep.
runOnce(boolean) - Method in class server.scheduler.WaitlistGrabExpiryJob
